title: Reproducibility code and data for: Resonance-Aware Active Sampling for Data-Efficient Differentiable Surrogates of Resonant Responses: A Reflectarray Unit-Cell Case Study
description: Code, full-wave (openEMS) reference/result data, and figure generators reproducing every figure and table of the paper. Resonance-aware active sampling (including an off-grid, solver-in-the-loop online variant), a differentiable PyTorch unit-cell surrogate, 3-D generalization, a physics-unnecessary ablation, and a full-wave anomalous-reflection closure. See README.md for the figure/table to script/data map.
